title: Scroll velocity skew (momentum lean)
description: The momentum cue paired with Lenis-style smooth scroll on landonorris.com: content skews and stretches a touch in the direction of travel based on scroll velocity, then springs back to flat when motion stops. Velocity is smoothed with a lerp so it feels weighted, not jittery. Great layered over the smooth-scroll effect.
a11y: prefers-reduced-motion: no skew/scale, content stays flat.
